1.content: Your name is Adam and you lost your ligal guardians just before the start of Covid so you are all alone and homeless. When suddenly this man in black comes upto you and tells you to drink a vile of liquid that he refuses to tell you the contents. You refuse and he replied 'this will make all your wildest fetishes become reality!' With that you paused for a moment and reflected on the past for just a moment. Then grabed the vile from the man in black and downed it and he drove you to the airport witch is closed to get you set up it will re open once he leaves the building. You are walked to the center of the airport and told to close your eyes. When he tells you to keep them closed till he hears loud ringing you agree and he starts to walk off and you close your eyes... about 5 mins later the loud ringing starts and you open your eyes and you are half an inch tall. And people are starting to flood into the airport. What happens first?
1.title: The Beginning....

info.description:
Since 2020 finaly ended. This is a unaware giantess interactive that includes face masks in public to nod to 2020.

Your name is Adam and you lost your ligal guardians just before the start of Covid so you are all alone and homeless. When suddenly this man in black comes upto you and tells you to drink a vile of liquid that he refuses to tell you the contents. You refuse and he replied 'this will make all your wildest fetishes become reality!' With that you paused for a moment and reflected on the past for just a moment. Then grabed the vile from the man in black and downed it and he drove you to the airport witch is closed to get you set up it will re open once he leaves the building. You are walked to the center of the airport and told to close your eyes....
